title: Emperor's Ball
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Emperor's Ball''' was an annual event. One year, as a member of the [[House of Organa/Legends|House of Organa]] entourage, [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] encountered [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and, believing him to be a new model of [[Guard droid/Legends|guard droid]], tried to strike up a conversation. As punishment, he was assigned to preschool duty for a year.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1995-10-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''
